title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 160.031 - School districts formed of cities or towns, defined
text:
160.031.  School districts formed of cities or towns, defined. — For the purpose of taxation under Section 11 of Article X of the Constitution, the term "school districts formed of cities or towns" includes any seven-director district in which is located any town or incorporated city.
(L. 1963 p. 200 § 1-3)
